title: doellingeria vialis
intro: Doellingeria vialis, also known as False Goldenrod, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Doellingeria vialis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and ease respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Doellingeria vialis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
